title: Elevating Small Business Partnerships
description: ERDC, in coordination with ERDCWERX, is hosting a hybrid small business workshop that will feature informational briefings to assist small businesses when pursuing government contract opportunities.
text:
Overview
The U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC), in coordination with ERDCWERX, is hosting a hybrid small business workshop that will feature informational briefings to assist small businesses when pursuing government contract opportunities.
Objective
This hybrid event is an opportunity for small businesses to learn about collaboration opportunities with ERDC, Army Geospatial Center (AGC), and Humphreys Engineer Center Support Activity (HECSA) as well as resources available for small businesses. Participants will have a chance to engage with key resource partners including:
ERDC Office of Research and Technology Transfer
ERDCWERX
Mississippi APEX Accelerator
Small Business Development Center – Hinds Community College
The RISE Center at Ole Miss
U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) Mississippi District Office
Tours of ERDC (limited capacity) and networking will also be available.
Location
ERDCWERX
1622 Washington Street, Suite 300
Vicksburg, Mississippi
Tentative Agenda
Wednesday, April 23 (All times in CT)
Travel Accommodations
Airport
Jackson-Medgar Wiley Evers International Airport
Hotels
